name: 珍妮弗·拉默斯
name_full: 珍妮弗·拉默斯 Jennifer Lahmers
birth_place: 美国,俄亥俄州,塔斯卡罗瓦斯

last_movies.title: 地狱厨房(美版) 第一季

introduction: Jennifer Lynn Lahmers (born February 19, 1984) is an American television news reporter, news anchor and model. She was a correspondent on Extra, a syndicated television newsmagazine reporting entertainment news from 2019 to 2023. Before joining Extra, Lahmers co-anchored Good Day Wake Up for Fox station WNYW in New York City and was a reporter and weekend anchor at several local television stations.
